message:
fix(fr-runtime): CLIENT KILL ID/USER/SKIPME wording matches upstream [bd-frankenredis-fid3]

Three CLIENT KILL filter wording divergences with vendored redis
7.2.4 networking.c::clientCommand:

- ID: fr emitted 'Invalid client ID' for both unparseable and <=0
  inputs; upstream uses getLongLongFromObjectOrReply with the
  message 'client-id should be greater than 0' covering both.

- USER: fr ignored unknown users and returned count=0 (filter
  matched nothing). Upstream calls ACLGetUserByName up-front and
  short-circuits with 'No such user <name>'.

- SKIPME: fr emitted 'argument must be yes or no'. Upstream falls
  through to syntaxerr ('syntax error').

Use auth_state.get_user(...) for the USER existence check.
Differential probe vs vendored redis 7.2.4 now byte-matches the
three cases.
